Overview of the Company: Discord is a voice, video, and text communication platform originally built for gamers but expanded to support diverse communities, creators, and hangouts. It enables persistent servers with channels for real-time chat, calls, and media sharing. Monetized primarily through Nitro subscriptions and server boosts, it boasts hundreds of millions of users with strong engagement. Under new leadership since 2025, it is navigating safety/regulatory challenges (e.g., age verification) while exploring broader monetization including ads and features.
Company Headquarters: 444 De Haro Street, Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA
Countries Operating In: United States; Netherlands; United Kingdom; Canada; Germany; France; Japan; Brazil; Australia; South Korea
Vision: To be the place where the world builds belonging.
Mission: To give people the power to create space to find community and belonging in their lives.
Values: Remember the human; Radical Transparency; Directness; Thriving on Change; Taking Ownership
Interesting Facts: Discord was built from the features of a failed MOBA game called 'Fates Forever'; The mascot 'Wumpus' was originally a placeholder design that became a brand icon.
Recent News: Confidential IPO Filing (Jan 2026); Leadership transition to Humam Sakhnini as CEO (April 2025); Integration of advanced AI moderation tools (Feb 2026)
Regulatory & Compliance Status: GDPR Compliant; CCPA Compliant; COPPA Compliant; ESRB/PEGI Integrated
Legal Issues / Controversies: FTC scrutiny over age verification (2026); Copyright lawsuits related to AI training data scraping on servers
ESG Practices or Ratings: Data center efficiency optimization; Community safety councils; Diversity & Inclusion transparency reporting
Supply Chain Dependencies: Google Cloud (Primary); AWS (Backup); NVIDIA (AI Compute); Cloudflare (CDN)
Geopolitical Risks: EU Digital Services Act; US Section 230 legislative changes; Global data localization laws
Macro Risks: Cyclic advertising market; High interest rate impact on IPO valuation; Regulatory scrutiny on encrypted platforms
Ethical Sourcing Practices: E-waste hardware recycling; Renewable energy clauses in cloud contracts
